CustomField.description: Please note: The data stored in this field is linked to the HomeKeeper National Data Hub. Do not hide it from the layout. The date the purchase information was confirmed. Auto-fills when you click the Certify Purchase button. Before clicking, verify that funding sources, appraisals, transaction costs, and close date are accurate.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: The date the purchase information was confirmed. Auto-fills when you click the Certify Purchase button. Before clicking, verify that funding sources, appraisals, transaction costs, and close date are accurate.
CustomField.label: Purchase Certification Date
